title: Giant Spooky Pumpkins
description: Adds giant spooky pumpkins with hidden dungeons, monsters, and loot.
body:
This mod adds giant spooky pumpkins that can be found scattered around the world.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec83dd60ffeadeaa75b858ed1534df842460d46e.jpeg)

Inside them, you’ll find small dungeons, monsters, and spooky loot to collect.

The biggest pumpkin features a two-layer dungeon filled with pumpkin-headed skeletons, a spooky detailed atmosphere, a small parkour section, loot rewards, and some hidden chests.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68d236b32aa029ce042b9e0956f062415a37544d.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8c0bd5c20d7c0cf2d17798c9b085b20cfc31bb7.jpeg)

The two smaller pumpkins have simpler rooms but are still packed with skeletons and loot to discover.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a634c26841e1b9bae8233f7521a8c11f4017e401.jpeg)

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4d7195743f7b109633f1a3318ce0cef2fc6d582.jpeg)

They’re rare, spawning in Forest, Taiga Forest, and Plains biomes.

🎃 Perfect for the spooky season! 🎃

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
